name: pdf-convert-compdf
tagline: ClawHub (95★): PDF conversion toolkit featuring AI layout analysis and OCR. Converts PDFs to Word, Markdown, JSON, PPT, CSV, HTML, and XML
verdict: Main issue: the description promises XML output, but the actual supported-formats list doesn't include XML at all — a mismatch that could lead you to request something the skill can't deliver. It also gives no out-of-scope guidance for this broad multi-format conversion tool, and its commercial PyPI package installs unpinned.
